summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that CHD is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $96.81. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 25.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 5 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $100.29 and a significant trendline confluence around $100.26 (formed by 12 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
